translations.en: an amused looking gentleman.
translations.zh: 一位面帶玩味神情的紳士。

translations.en: "You'll have to excuse me, but the bar's closed right now."
translations.zh: 「請見諒，酒吧目前已打烊。」

translations.en: "@Taynith and I have a lot to talk about."
translations.zh: 「在下與@Taynith（泰尼）絲有很多話要聊。」

translations.en: "Come by the Cat's Lair when I'm open for business."
translations.zh: 「待在下開門時來貓窩酒館。」

translations.en: "Ah, I see you've brought me a tasty little mouse to feed my @pets..."
translations.zh: 「啊，我見汝為在下帶來了美味的小老鼠來餵在下的@pets（寵物）……」

translations.en: "Eeeeek!"
"Don't worry, I was just kidding... Any friend of Lord British is a friend of mine."
translations.zh: 「別擔心，在下只是開玩笑……不列顛王的任何朋友都是在下的朋友。」

translations.en: "Welcome to the Cat's Lair."
translations.zh: 「歡迎來到貓窩酒館。」

translations.en: "Anything else I can do for you?"
translations.zh: 「還有什麼在下能效勞的？」

translations.en: "My name's Dr. @Cat."
translations.zh: 「在下是@Cat（貓博）士。」

translations.en: "If you treat my cats well, they'll treat you the same."
translations.zh: 「若汝善待在下的貓咪，她們也會以同樣方式對待汝。」

translations.en: "Which, @ale, @mead, @wine, @milk, or @mutton?"
translations.zh: 「要哪樣？@ale（麥酒）、@mead（蜂蜜）酒、@wine（葡萄）酒、@milk（牛奶）還是@mutton（羊肉）？」

translations.en: "I sell @ale, @mead, @wine, @milk, and @mutton. Of course I like to chat with my @patrons, and indulge in a friendly @game every now and then."
translations.zh: 「在下賣@ale（麥酒）、@mead（蜂蜜）酒、@wine（葡萄）酒、@milk（牛奶）和@mutton（羊肉）。當然在下也喜歡與@patrons（顧客）閒聊，偶爾玩個友誼@game（遊戲）。」

translations.en: "@Thindle and @Mortude may not agree, but I like a game that provides a little intellectual @challenge."
translations.zh: 「@Thindle（辛德）爾和@Mortude（莫圖）德或許不同意，但在下喜歡有點智識@challenge（挑戰）性的遊戲。」

translations.en: "I'm sure he'd be glad to @play a few rounds of flippits with you."
translations.zh: 「在下相信他很樂意與汝@play（玩幾）輪骨彈戲。」

translations.en: "If only I had a copy of Snilwit's Big @Book of Boardgame Strategy..."
translations.zh: 「若在下能有一本斯尼爾維特的《桌遊@Book（書）》就好了……」

translations.en: "Then I could find some really fine games to teach everyone."
translations.zh: 「那樣在下就能找到些真正好的遊戲教大家玩了。」

translations.en: "This is a nice friendly town. All the townsfolk know each other. We get a lot of @visitors, too."
translations.zh: 「這是個友善的好鎮子，鎮上居民都互相認識，@visitors（過客）也不少。」

translations.en: "I chose @Paws for my tavern because it's right on the King's Way, midway between @Britain and @Trinsic."
translations.zh: 「在下選擇在@Paws（鴉爪）鎮開酒館，因為它正好位於王道之上，介於@Britain（不列顛城）和@Trinsic（崔西）克的中途。」

translations.en: "There's no better travelled spot in all Britannia, and that makes for good business."
translations.zh: 「全不列顛尼亞沒有比這裡更繁忙的地方了，這對生意大有裨益。」

translations.en: "I like the name of the town too, of course!"
translations.zh: 「當然，在下也很喜歡這個鎮子的名字！」
translations.note: 鴉爪鎮Paws對貓而言很親切

translations.en: "A nice place to visit, eh?"
translations.zh: 「是個不錯的地方，是嗎？」

translations.en: "A bit too honorable for my tastes, if you know what I mean..."
translations.zh: 「對在下的口味來說稍嫌過於正直了，如果汝明白在下的意思……」

translations.en: "Taynith is my dearest friend. Her @gypsy band travels the King's Way."
translations.zh: 「泰尼絲是在下最親愛的朋友，她的@gypsy（吉普）賽樂隊走遍王道。」

translations.en: "Once a week, she stops in to say hello."
translations.zh: 「每週一次，她會順道來打個招呼。」

translations.en: "Don't get the two gypsy bands mixed up... Taynith travels with @Zoltan."
translations.zh: 「別把兩支吉普賽樂隊搞混……泰尼絲和@Zoltan（佐坦）一起走。」

translations.en: "The other group are a bunch of pickpockets and scallawags..."
translations.zh: 「另一支則是一幫扒手和流氓……」

translations.en: "Yes, Zoltan, @king of the gypsies!"
translations.zh: 「是的，佐坦，吉普賽的@king（國王）！」

translations.en: "I guess you can call yourself king of anything, if nobody comes along to dispute it..."
translations.zh: 「在下想，只要沒人提出異議，任何人都可以自稱什麼王……」

translations.en: "A friend of Taynith's, are you? Here, have one on the house." He hands you an ale.
translations.zh: 「汝是泰尼絲的朋友？來，這杯在下請客。」他遞給汝一杯麥酒。

translations.en: "Taynith bet me one time I couldn't catch a duck with my bare hands."
translations.zh: 「泰尼絲曾和在下打賭，說在下徒手抓不到鴨子。」

translations.en: "So I did, and had a leash made for it, so I could give it to her as a pet."
translations.zh: 「在下就抓到了，還特地為鴨子做了條牽繩，好送給她當寵物。」

translations.en: "I doubt she still has it, though. I saw @Zoltan eyeing it hungrily..."
translations.zh: 「不過在下懷疑她還留著那鴨子，在下見@Zoltan（佐坦）用飢餓的眼神盯著它……」

translations.en: "Very good! you purr almost as well as @Kytyn."
translations.zh: 「說得好！汝的呼嚕聲幾乎和@Kytyn（奇婷）一樣好。」

translations.en: "She lives in Britain."
translations.zh: 「她住在不列顛城。」

translations.en: "Are you friends of that deadbeat? He owes me for more drinks than I care to think about."
translations.zh: 「汝是那個賴皮的朋友？他欠在下的酒錢多得在下不想去想。」

translations.en: "The only reason I give him food and drink is because he can't sing with his mouth full!"
translations.zh: 「在下給他吃喝的唯一理由，是因為他嘴裡塞滿東西就唱不了歌了！」

translations.en: "Which of you?"
translations.zh: 「汝們誰？」

translations.en: "That's #1 crowns. Want some?"
translations.zh: 「共#1金，要嗎？」

translations.en: "You don't have room to carry it."
translations.zh: 「汝沒有空間攜帶。」

translations.en: "Here you are." $N gives $Y the $1.
"You're a bit short on gold."
translations.zh: 「汝的金幣有點不足。」

translations.en: "Drink up and enjoy, for who knows what tomorrow may bring?"
translations.zh: 「盡情享用吧，誰知明日會如何？」

translations.en: "Which of you?"
translations.zh: 「汝們誰？」

translations.en: "Milk is very good for you, and only 5 crowns for a whole bucket. Want some?"
translations.zh: 「牛奶對汝大有裨益，整桶只要5金，要嗎？」

translations.en: "You don't have room to carry it."
translations.zh: 「汝沒有空間攜帶。」

translations.en: $N gives $Y the milk. "You have good taste, my friend."
translations.zh: $N給$Y牛奶。「汝有好品味，朋友。」

translations.en: "You're a bit short on gold."
translations.zh: 「汝的金幣有點不足。」

translations.en: "If you aren't thirsty, you could always get some to give to the cats."
translations.zh: 「若汝不渴，也可以買些牛奶給貓咪喝。」

translations.en: "It's the quickest way to get on their good side."
translations.zh: 「這是討她們歡心的最快方法。」

translations.en: "Which of you?"
translations.zh: 「汝們誰？」

translations.en: "I sell the finest mutton, and for only 3 gold per serving. How many servings do you want?"
translations.zh: 「在下賣最上等的羊肉，每份只需3金，汝要幾份？」

translations.en: $N looks at $Y. "You haven't any room in your pack."
translations.zh: $N看向$Y，「汝的背包已沒有空間了。」

translations.en: "You're a bit short on gold."
translations.zh: 「汝的金幣有點不足。」

translations.en: $N hands the rations to $Y.
translations.zh: $N將口糧遞給$Y。

translations.en: He hands $Y #9 mutton ration\s.
translations.zh: 他遞給$Y #9份羊肉口糧。

translations.en: "That's all you can carry."
translations.zh: 「這是汝能攜帶的極限了。」

translations.en: "That's all you can afford."
translations.zh: 「這是汝能負擔的極限了。」

translations.en: Mead
translations.zh: 蜂蜜酒

translations.en: Ale
translations.zh: 麥酒

translations.en: Wine
translations.zh: 葡萄酒

translations.en: "I think I've got time for a quick game of Nim..."
translations.zh: 「在下想在下有時間玩一局快速的尼姆棋……」

translations.en: "Would you care to wager on the outcome, just to keep things interesting?"
translations.zh: 「汝願意下注嗎，只是為了增添點趣味？」

translations.en: "Well, maybe after you've had a few practice games."
translations.zh: 「嗯，或許先練習幾局再說。」

translations.en: "Tell you what... I'm in a reckless mood. This time you can bet as much as you like."
translations.zh: 「這樣吧……在下今天心情冒進，這次汝想賭多少就賭多少。」

translations.en: "Excellent! How much would you like to bet?"
translations.zh: 「極好！汝想賭多少？」

translations.en: "You don't have that much...
translations.zh: 「汝沒有那麼多……

translations.en: "That's a little steep for a friendly game. Let's just make it 50 crowns."
translations.zh: 「對友誼賽來說賭注高了點，就定50金吧。」

translations.en: "Let me just remind you of the rules, in case you don't remember."
translations.zh: 「讓在下提醒汝規則，以防汝忘記了。」

translations.en: "We start with ten pieces." He takes some colorful glass beads out of his pocket.
translations.zh: 「我們從十顆棋子開始。」他從口袋裡取出幾顆色彩繽紛的玻璃珠。

translations.en: "Each player takes turns, taking one, two or three beads out of the pile."
translations.zh: 「每位玩家輪流從堆中取走一、二或三顆珠子。」

translations.en: "Whoever gets the last one wins!"
translations.zh: 「取走最後一顆者獲勝！」

translations.en: "I'll play first this time."
translations.zh: 「這次在下先走。」

translations.en: "I'll let you play first this time."
translations.zh: 「這次讓汝先走。」

translations.en: There are #0 beads left. How many do you take?
translations.zh: 剩餘#0顆珠子，汝取走幾顆？

translations.en: "I'll take #1 bead\s."
translations.zh: 「在下取走#1顆珠子。」

translations.en: "I won!"
translations.zh: 「在下贏了！」

translations.en: "Don't take it too hard... I've had a lot of practice."
translations.zh: 「別太難過……在下練習了很久。」

translations.en: "I'll put your money someplace safe, in case you want to come and win it back later."
translations.zh: 「在下把汝的錢放在安全的地方，以防汝之後想來贏回去。」

translations.en: "Well done! You got the last bead."
translations.zh: 「幹得漂亮！汝取走了最後一顆珠子。」

translations.en: He takes some money out of a pouch and pays off your wager.
translations.zh: 他從錢袋中取出金幣，支付汝的賭注。

translations.en: "Would you like to @play again?"
translations.zh: 「汝想@play（再玩）一局嗎？」

translations.en: "@Purrrrhaps some other time, then."
translations.zh: 「@Purrrrhaps（呼嚕）~或許改日吧。」

translations.en: "Have you got a copy of Snilwit's that you'd be willing to sell?"
translations.zh: 「汝是否有一本斯尼爾維特的書願意出售？」

translations.en: "That's too bad. I'd pay well for it."
translations.zh: 「太可惜了，在下願意出好價錢。」

translations.en: "You must be mistaken."
translations.zh: 「汝一定是搞錯了。」

translations.en: "Put down some stuff, $Y, so you can carry some gold!"
translations.zh: 「$Y，放下些東西，好帶些金幣！」

translations.en: "Great! This is the definitive reference on boardgames."
translations.zh: 「太好了！這是桌遊的權威參考書。」

translations.en: He takes the book and gives
translations.zh: 他取走書冊，給

translations.en: you
translations.zh: 汝

translations.en: $Y
translations.zh: $Y

translations.en: #0 gold crowns.
translations.zh: #0枚金幣。

translator_notes: 110 Dr. Cat: 鴉爪鎮貓窩酒館主人，幽默紳士。愛好尼姆棋並與顧客對賭。尋找斯尼爾維特桌遊書。Taynith吉普賽朋友，Zoltan吉普賽王。
